nasb.text: For Tyre built herself a fortress And piled up silver like dust, And gold like the mire of the streets.

esv.text: Tyre has built herself a rampart and heaped up silver like dust, and fine gold like the mud of the streets.

cnv.text: 推羅為自己建造了堡壘， 堆積銀子，多如塵沙， 積聚精金，多如街上的泥土。

ccb.text: 泰尔为自己建造堡垒， 堆积的银子多如尘土， 金子多如街上的泥土。
